User.title: User
User.description: Represents a staff member with access to the admin panel, including their role and activity status.

name.description: The full name of the staff member.

email.description: The email address of the staff member, used for login.

role.description: The assigned role of the staff member, determining their access permissions.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

isActive.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active.

RoomCategory.title: RoomCategory
RoomCategory.description: Defines different types of rooms available in the hotel, including their pricing, capacity, and amenities.

name.description: The name of the room category (e.g., 'Deluxe Room', 'Suite').

description.description: A brief description of the room category.

basePrice.description: The base price per night for this room category.

maxOccupancy.description: The maximum number of guests allowed in this room category.

amenities.description: A list of amenities offered in rooms of this category (e.g., 'Mini Bar', 'WiFi', 'Bathtub').

photoURL.description: URL to a photo representing this room category.

isActive.description: Indicates whether this room category is active and available for booking.

Room.title: Room
Room.description: Represents a physical room within the hotel, including its number, floor, category, and current status.

roomNumber.description: The unique number or identifier for the room (e.g., '101', '2A').

floor.description: The floor on which the room is located (e.g., 'Ground Floor', '1st Floor').

categoryId.description: Reference to the RoomCategory this room belongs to.

categoryName.description: Denormalized name of the room category for quick display.

status.description: The current operational status of the room.

housekeepingStatus.description: The current cleaning status of the room.

isActive.description: Indicates if the room is active and available for use.

notes.description: Internal notes or remarks about the room.

currentBookingId.description: Reference to the active booking occupying this room, if any.

Guest.title: Guest
Guest.description: Stores information about a guest, including personal details, contact, and stay history.

name.description: The full name of the guest.

phone.description: The contact phone number of the guest.

email.description: The email address of the guest.

idType.description: The type of identification provided by the guest (e.g., 'Passport', 'Aadhar').

idNumber.description: The identification number from the provided document.

address.description: The permanent address of the guest.

notes.description: Internal notes or remarks about the guest.

tags.description: A list of tags associated with the guest (e.g., 'VIP', 'Corporate', 'Repeat').

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the guest record was created.

totalStays.description: The total number of stays this guest has had at the hotel.

source.description: The initial source of the guest's first booking.

Booking.title: Booking
Booking.description: Details of a guest's reservation, including room choice, dates, guest information, and booking status.

guestId.description: Reference to the Guest who made the booking.

guestName.description: Denormalized name of the guest for quick display.

guestPhone.description: Denormalized phone number of the guest for quick display.

guestEmail.description: Denormalized email of the guest for quick display.

roomId.description: Reference to the assigned Room for this booking, if any.

roomNumber.description: Denormalized room number for quick display, if a room is assigned.

categoryId.description: Reference to the RoomCategory requested or assigned for this booking.

categoryName.description: Denormalized name of the room category for quick display.

checkIn.description: The planned check-in date and time for the booking.

checkOut.description: The planned check-out date and time for the booking.

numberOfNights.description: The total number of nights for the stay.

numberOfGuests.description: The number of guests included in the booking.

status.description: The current status of the booking.

bookingType.description: Indicates whether the booking is a 'walkin' or an 'advance' reservation.

specialRequests.description: Any special requests made by the guest.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the booking was created.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User who created the booking, if applicable.

earlyCheckIn.description: Indicates if early check-in was requested or granted.

lateCheckOut.description: Indicates if late check-out was requested or granted.

Bill.title: Bill
Bill.description: Records the financial details for a guest's stay, including charges, taxes, discounts, and payment status.

bookingId.description: Reference to the Booking associated with this bill.

guestId.description: Reference to the Guest associated with this bill.

guestName.description: Denormalized name of the guest for quick display.

roomNumber.description: Denormalized room number for quick display.

checkIn.description: Denormalized check-in date from the booking.

checkOut.description: Denormalized check-out date from the booking.

numberOfNights.description: Denormalized number of nights from the booking.

roomCharges.description: The total charges for the room stay.

extraCharges.description: A list of additional charges (e.g., mini-bar, laundry).

taxRate.description: The tax rate applied to the bill (e.g., 0.12 for 12%).

discountValue.description: The value of the discount applied.

subtotal.description: The total amount before taxes and discounts.

totalAmount.description: The final total amount due or paid.

generatedAt.description: Timestamp when the bill was generated.

generatedBy.description: Reference to the User who generated the bill.

MaintenanceTicket.title: MaintenanceTicket
MaintenanceTicket.description: Records maintenance requests for rooms, tracking issues, priority, and resolution.

roomId.description: Reference to the Room for which the ticket was raised.

roomNumber.description: Denormalized room number for quick display.

title.description: A brief title describing the maintenance issue.

description.description: Detailed description of the maintenance issue.

raisedBy.description: Reference to the User who raised the maintenance ticket.

raisedAt.description: Timestamp when the maintenance ticket was raised.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp when the maintenance ticket was resolved.

resolvedBy.description: Reference to the User who resolved the maintenance ticket.

notes.description: Internal notes or remarks about the maintenance issue or resolution.

Enquiry.title: Enquiry
Enquiry.description: Stores contact form submissions from the public guest website.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the enquiry.

phone.description: The contact phone number provided by the enquirer.

email.description: The email address provided by the enquirer.

message.description: The detailed message or query from the enquirer.

submittedAt.description: Timestamp when the enquiry was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the enquiry.

HotelSetting.title: HotelSetting
HotelSetting.description: Stores hotel-wide configuration and administrative settings, typically a single document.

hotelName.description: The official name of the hotel.

address.description: The physical address of the hotel.

phone.description: The primary contact phone number for the hotel.

email.description: The primary contact email address for the hotel.

logoURL.description: URL to the hotel's logo image.

taxRate.description: The default tax rate applied to services, as a decimal (e.g., 0.12 for 12%).

serviceChargeRate.description: The default service charge rate applied, as a decimal (e.g., 0.05 for 5%).

checkInTime.description: The standard check-in time for guests (e.g., '12:00 PM').

checkOutTime.description: The standard check-out time for guests (e.g., '11:00 AM').

seasonalPricing.description: A list of rules for seasonal price adjustments.

definition.description: Stores staff member details, including their role for role-based access control.
Represents individual physical rooms in the hotel.
Stores guest profiles and contact information.
Records financial details for guest stays.
Stores contact form submissions from the guest website.
Stores global hotel configuration and settings.
